title: Phantom's Utilities
description: A mod that will add various utilitarian/functional items/blocks I will come up with.
body:
A work in progress mod that will add various utilitarian/functional items/blocks I will come up with during the development of Craftoria.

Currently added features:

Spray Can - allows the user the recolor various blocks like AE2 cables, wool, terracotta, concrete etc. with a single item. Doesn't use dye beyond the initial crafting recipe. Infinite durability.

Shift and scroll on the item to select the color. Right click on blocks to recolor them according to the selected color. Shift and right click to batch recolor blocks of the same type and color connected to eachother.
